ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { success: false, httpStatus: vars.httpStatus default 500, errorCode: vars.errorCode default "INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR", message: vars.errorMessage default "An unexpected error occurred", detail: error.description default "", correlationId: vars.correlationId default correlationId, timestamp: now() as String {format: "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss.SSSZ"}, source: "sap-erp-sapi" }

logger.doc:name: Log SAP Connectivity Error
logger.message: #["[" ++ (vars.correlationId default "") ++ "] SAP backend connectivity failure: " ++ error.description default ""]

set-variable.doc:name: Set Error Message
set-variable.value: Unable to reach SAP ERP backend system. Please retry later.

logger.doc:name: Log SAP Timeout Error
logger.message: #["[" ++ (vars.correlationId default "") ++ "] SAP backend request timed out: " ++ error.description default ""]

set-variable.doc:name: Set Error Message
set-variable.value: The request to SAP ERP backend timed out. Please retry later.

logger.doc:name: Log Validation Error
logger.message: #["[" ++ (vars.correlationId default "") ++ "] Request validation failed: " ++ error.description default ""]
